_comment: Expected output for the Thomas 37-page inspection PDF (16MB). Update this file whenever you manually verify what the parser should find. The test uses this as a contract — if the parser regresses, the test will tell you.
description: 37-page residential inspection report, large scanned/image PDF (16MB), routes via OpenAI Files API two-pass path
source: Unknown — large image-based PDF, not text-extractable by pdfjs

mustInclude._comment: Shingle aging / end-of-life roof finding seen in original 4-finding parse

_updateInstructions: After a successful parse that returns ≥15 findings, review the output and fill in mustInclude entries for 3-5 of the most important findings. Set minimumFindings to the actual count minus a 20% buffer.
